name: No Sugar Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the first five ingredients in a bowl until smooth.
2. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until thickened.
3. Slice the apples and place them in the prepared pie crust.
4. Pour the mixture over the apples.
5. Cover with the top pie crust.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes.
7. Optionally, sprinkle Sweet and Low over the apples before baking.
Note: This pie can be made without a crust to save calories. Place the filling in a pie pan instead of the crust. The recipe can also be adapted for fresh peaches by omitting the water as the peaches will provide enough juice.
